# Modern Harmony — Color Token Reference

All resolved values extracted from the Figma "Modern UI Styles" and "Modern Components" libraries.

## Text Colors
| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--dec_color_text_label` | `#282828` | Primary text, headings, labels |
| `--dec_color_text_secondary` | `#6b6b6b` | Secondary text, descriptions |
| `--dec_color_text_placeholder` | `#9e9e9e` | Input placeholder text |
| `--dec_color_text_disabled` | `#b0b0b0` | Disabled state text |

## Surface / Background
| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--dec_color_surface_primary` | `#ffffff` | Page background, cards |
| `--dec_color_surface_secondary` | `#f7f7f7` | Subtle backgrounds, alt rows |
| `--dec_color_surface_tertiary` | `#f0f0f4` | Header cell fills, panels |
| `--dec_color_surface_header` | `#ffffff` | App header background |

## Brand / Action Colors
| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--dec_color_secondary_strong` | `#8342bb` | Primary action buttons, active states |
| `--dec_color_secondary_foreground` | `#7239a4` | Hover state for primary actions |
| `--dec_color_secondary_light` | `#f5f0fa` | Light brand background tint |
| `--dec_color_secondary_base` | `#e4daef` | Pill background, subtle brand |
| `--dec_color_secondary_text` | `#282828` | Text on secondary backgrounds |
| `--dec_color_brand_base` | `#282828` | Navigation brand element |

## Switch
| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--dec_color_switch_selected` | `#B9ACE8` | Toggle switch ON fill |
| `--dec_color_switch_indicator` | `#ffffff` | Toggle switch knob |

## Button / Element
| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--dec_color_disabled_subtle` | `#fbfbfb` | Default button background |
| `--dec_color_disabled_border` | `#cccccc` | Default button border |
| `--dec_element_hzpadding` | `16px` | Horizontal padding |
| `--dec_element_vtpadding` | `8px` | Vertical padding |
| `--dec_element_margin` | `4px` | Inner element margin |

## Grid
| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--dec_color_header-cell_fill` | `#f0f0f4` | Grid header cell background |
| `--dec_color_grid-cell_border` | `#e5e5ec` | Cell borders |
| `--dec_color_grid_alt-row` | `#fbfbfb` | Alternating row background |
| `--dec_color_grid-input-cell_border` | `#4b4a5d` | Active input cell border |
| `--dec_grid-cell_hzpadding` | `12px` | Cell horizontal padding |
| `--dec_grid-cell_hzmargin` | `12px` | Cell horizontal margin |

## Dividers
| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--dec_color_div_base` | `#e5e5ec` | Horizontal dividers, borders |

## Alert / Severity Colors
| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--dec_color_error_subtle` | `#fbece9` | Error cell background |
| `--dec_color_error_foreground` | `#981e15` | Error text |
| `--dec_color_warning_subtle` | `#fff4e5` | Warning cell background |
| `--dec_color_warning_foreground` | `#92400e` | Warning text |
| `--dec_color_info_subtle` | `#fff9e6` | Info cell background |
| `--dec_color_info_foreground` | `#854d0e` | Info text |
| `--dec_color_success_subtle` | `#e8f5e9` | Success cell background |
| `--dec_color_success_foreground` | `#1b5e20` | Success text |

## Spacing
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--core_sp_rem` | `4px` | Base unit |
| `--core_sp_rem2` | `8px` | 2x base |
| `--core_sp_rem3` | `12px` | 3x base |
| `--core_sp_rem4` | `16px` | 4x base |
| `--core_sp_rem5` | `20px` | 5x base |
| `--core_sp_rem6` | `24px` | 6x base |

## Border Radius
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--dec_base_crn` | `8px` | Buttons, cards, containers |
| `--dec_pill_crn` | `16px` | Pills, tags, full-round |
| `--dec_switch_crn` | `16px` | Switch track |

## Line Heights
| Token | Value |
|-------|-------|
| `--line-height-md` | `16px` |
| `--line-height-lg` | `20px` |
| `--line-height-xl` | `24px` |

## Text Sizes
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--dec_text_size_label_sm` | `12px` | Small labels, pills |
| `--dec_text_size_label_md` | `14px` | Standard labels, body |
| `--dec_text_size_body_md` | `14px` | Body text |
| `--dec_text_size_heading_xl` | `30px` | Page title |

## App Header
| Token | Value |
|-------|-------|
| `--dec_color_surface_header` | `#ffffff` |
| `--dec_color_div_base` | `#e5e5ec` |
| `--dec_app-header_height` | `56px` |

## Typography
| Style | Font | Weight | Size | Line Height | Letter Spacing |
|-------|------|--------|------|-------------|----------------|
| Headline/XL Light | Switzer | 300 | 30px | 32px | -0.3px |
| Headline/XL Medium | Switzer | 500 | 30px | 32px | -0.3px |
| Label/MD Regular | Switzer | 400 | 14px | 16px | 0.07px |
| Label/MD Medium | Switzer | 500 | 14px | 16px | 0.07px |
| Label/SM Regular | Switzer | 400 | 12px | 16px | 0.07px |
| Body/MD Regular | Switzer | 400 | 14px | 20px | 0 |
